title: Help with car payments and auto loan assistance | Wells Fargo

sections.name: Hero Marquee
sections.background: image-based (photo of couple standing in front of house with car)
sections.style: dark overlay on image, centered white text
sections.overview: Full-width marquee image with centered heading and phone number call-to-action

sequences.description: Full-width marquee image showing couple standing in front of house with car, overlaid with centered heading 'When you can't make a car payment, we're here to help' and paragraph with bold phone number 1-800-289-8004 and supportive text

sections.name: What you can do
sections.style: light, centered section title with decorative line, icon card grid below
sections.overview: Section heading followed by grid of 4 icon cards describing payment options

sequences.description: Centered section heading 'What you can do' with decorative line above

Grid of 4 items in a row, each with a small icon (64x64), a heading, and a short description paragraph. Items: 'Change your payment due date', 'Defer a payment', 'Make payment arrangements', 'Surrender your vehicle'

sections.name: Related questions
sections.style: light, centered section title with decorative line, expandable FAQ items, centered CTA button at bottom
sections.overview: FAQ accordion section with 4 expandable questions and a link to view all FAQs

sequences.description: Centered section heading 'Related questions' with decorative line above

Four expandable question-and-answer pairs (accordion style): 'What happens if I miss a payment or make a late payment?', 'Does a late payment affect my credit?', 'What happens to my vehicle if it gets repossessed?', 'If you repossess my vehicle, can I get it back?'
Centered secondary button labeled 'Review all FAQs' linking to /help/loans/auto-loans-faqs/

sections.name: Additional resources
sections.style: light, centered section title with decorative line, icon card grid with links below
sections.overview: Section heading followed by grid of 3 resource cards with icons, descriptions, and action links

sequences.description: Centered section heading 'Additional resources' with decorative line above

Grid of 3 items, each with a small icon (64x64), heading, description text, and a link. Items: 'Financial Health' (Learn more link to /financial-health/), 'Explore payment options' (Let's go link to /auto-loans/make-payments/), 'Call us' (phone number 1-800-289-8004 with business hours)

sections.name: Footnotes and Disclaimers
sections.overview: Legal footnotes and document reference codes

sequences.description: Footnote text: '1. Terms and conditions apply...' referencing Autopay, followed by document codes QSR-12052026-8045543.1.1 and LRC-0925

localBlocks.name: hero
localBlocks.purpose: Large heading, text, buttons, optional background image for page intro

localBlocks.name: cards
localBlocks.purpose: Grid of items with images/icons and text

localBlocks.name: accordion-faq
localBlocks.purpose: Expandable question and answer sections (FAQ format)
